## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Venky Kanesan (Menlo Ventures) to discuss GrowthX's business and potential Series B investment.](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX: AI-powered content/growth service for brands, $11M run rate, 50+ customers in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Seeking $40-60M Series B; burning $200k/mo, adding $1M+ net new MRR](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Menlo Ventures highly interested; will expedite due diligence for potential decision by Sept 15](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Founded \~12 months ago; raised Series A from Madrona (first outside capital)](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [$11M current run rate, burned \~$3M total](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [70+ employees (40 delivery, 30 build); distributed team with SF presence](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Key customers: Webflow, Ramp, Abnormal Security, SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Positioned as "replacing every marketing agency" with AI-powered platform + expert services](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)

### Product and Technology

  - [AI-powered platform for content strategy, creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Four layers: strategy, workflows, experts-in-loop, execution](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Internal platform evolving into customer-facing dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Coding agent creates/improves workflows dynamically](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Launch of Tech.ai: "Crunchbase meets G2 meets Fathom visibility directory"](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Go-to-Market Strategy

  - [8-week paid strategy sprint ($20-30K) with 100% conversion to 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [High ACV ($180K) and win rates without marketing spend](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Services-led approach with increasing product exposure over time](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### Competitive Differentiation

  - [vs. Profound.ai: GrowthX does the work + monitors results (not just visibility tool)](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Experts-in-loop model with former TechCrunch, Sam Rush editorial leads](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Addressing shift in marketing due to AI (search engines to Gen AI optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Traction and Financials

  - [50+ customers in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Last month: $200K burn, $1M+ net new MRR added](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Example: Ramp (approaching $1B ARR) - 700+ pages produced, primary content producer](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### Team Background

  - [Marcel Santilli (CEO): Ex-CMO of Skill.ai, marketing leadership at HashiCorp, ServiceTitan](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Daniel (CTO, co-founder): Ex-head of product at IFTTT, Basecamp spinoff](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [High-caliber engineering/product team from HashiCorp, Airbnb, Stripe, Grammarly, Coinbase](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send investor deck and data room access to Venky](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Menlo to conduct due diligence, aiming for partner meeting on Sept 15](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Venky to arrange meetings with Joff Redfern (ex-CPO Atlassian) and Derek for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Menlo to speak with existing customers (e.g., Abnormal) and potentially intro new ones](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Marcel available for follow-up questions/meetings (415-604-7417)](https://fathom.video/share/ibXyV7QgKAxx6kYPq6qhzZVgRM8yzyWB?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
